stemHtml:
A flight crew of a turbojet aeroplane prepares a Commercial Air Transport flight using the information below. The flight is operated as planned. What is correct regarding the Landing Mass (LM)?

Maximum Certificated Landing Mass: 53 900 kg
Performance Limited Landing Mass: 51 950 kg
Dry Operating Mass: 35 500 kg
Block Fuel: 9720 kg
Taxi Fuel: 120 kg
Trip Fuel: 5080 kg
Estimated Traffic Load: 11 800 kg

Changes in trip fuel due to mass changes may be ignored for this question.

options.a: LM = 51 940 and it does NOT exceed the Regulated LM.
options.b: LM = 51 820 and it does NOT exceed the Regulated LM.
options.c: LM = 52 380 and it exceeds the Regulated LM.
options.d: LM = 47 300 and it exceeds the Regulated LM.
